name: github-analyzer
description: Analyzes a GitHub repository's recent commits, pulling data via HTTP and checking against regex patterns. Requires a 'github_token' secret.

search_pattern.title: Search Regex
search_pattern.description: Optional regular expression to search for in commit messages (e.g., '(?i)(fix|bug|issue)')

secret_name.title: Secret Name
secret_name.description: Name of the secret containing the GitHub PAT (defaults to 'github_token')
